scripts.build:apk: cross-env CAPACITOR_BUILD=true next build && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: cross-env CAPACITOR_BUILD=true pnpm run build:apk && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd ..
scripts.apk:release: cross-env CAPACITOR_BUILD=true pnpm run build:apk && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease && cd ..
scripts.aab:release: cross-env CAPACITOR_BUILD=true pnpm run build:apk && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease && cd ..
